coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. 39 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 87% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/2. 83-87% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 87% for 15:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 15:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 15:00 at 87%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 21 minutes of work done. 19 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 19 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/2. 57% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 87% × 15:00. Then 4min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 87%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 87% for 15:00. Then 4min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 87% × 15:00. Seated, 85-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 90% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 4:24. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
